titleStmt.title: Letter from J. E. Devlin to Robert Chalmers, 10 August 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: J. E. Devlin

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from J. E. Devlin, Assistant Secretary, Local Government Board, to Sir Robert Chalmers (1858-1938) returning the audited accounts fro the Prosecutor and Witness Expenses submitted by Waterford County Council. A handwritten note added by the C.S.O. gives instructions for payment.J. E. Devlin was an Assistant Secretary for the Local Government Board. Sir Robert Chalmers (1858 - 1938) was sent to Ireland as replacement under-secretary for Sir Matthew Nathan, who had resigned along with Augustine Birrell, his chief secretary, following the outbreak of the Easter Rising in 1916.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/5620/13777

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
CERTIFIED PROSECUTORS' AND WITNESSES' EXPENSES. LOCAL GOVERNMENT BOARD DUBLIN, 10 th August, 1916. Sir, I am directed by the Local Government Board for Ireland to send
back herewith, duly certified by the Auditor, Mr. DB Sheehan
the return of the Expenses of Prosecutors and Witnesses n the County Borough
of Waterford for the half year ended the 31 st
of March, 1916. The documents which accompanied the Return are also enclosed. I am, Sir,
Your obedient Servant,
J.E. Devlin
Assistant Secretary. To The Under Secretary, &c., &c., &c., Dublin Castle. I Order Payment
II Send N.R. to Bons Treasurer
III Afc. for V. Box
